creator: Nick Kazamias
source_text:
(👇recipe) 300 Calorie Huge & Massive Crumbl Protein Brookie 

🗣️🗣️ Are you FOLLOWING @nickkaz.fit

—

First ever low cal high protein recipe generator app coming very soon

✳️ Macros (per circle brookie in video - recipe makes 2 of the biggest brookies you’ve ever seen):
305 Cals, 32g Net Carbs, 5g Fat, 32g Protein

It’s 305 calories per, I said under 300 in the video and misspoke

✳️ Ingredients for Cookie Batter:

Wet:
40g (3 tbsp) Plain or Vanilla Nonfat Greek Yogurt 25mL (1 tbsp + 2 tsp) Egg Whites 2.1mL (1/2 tsp) Vanilla Extract (optional)

Dry:
10g (1 tbsp + 1 tsp) All Purpose Flour 10g (1/3 Scoop) Casein Protein Powder (@legion code nickkaz saves $$ 5g (2 tsp) Oat Flour 24g (2 tbsp) Granulated Sugar Substitute 1g (1/4 tsp) Baking Soda Pinch of Salt

✳️ Ingredients for Brownie Batter:

Wet:
120mL (1/2 Cup) Egg Whites 80g (1/3 Cup) Plain or Vanilla Nonfat Greek Yogurt 120g (1/2 Cup) Pumpkin Purée 120mL (1/2 Cup) Almond Milk

Dry:
35g (1/4 Cup) All Purpose Flour
Extra 35g (1/4 Cup) All Purpose Flour (*optional - makes it denser) 72–96g (6–8 tbsp) Granulated Sugar Substitute 20g (2/3 Scoop) Whey/Casein Blend Protein Powder (@legion code nickkaz saves $$) 25g (1/4 Cup) Black or Dark Cocoa Powder 2g (1/3 tsp) Baking Soda 2g (1/2 tsp) Baking Powder Pinch of Salt

Cookie Topping:
10g Chocolate Chips
Extra Chocolate Chips (*optional*)

*I recommend using a whey/casein blend (or 75% casein / 25% whey) for the best fudgy texture.

✳️ Decoration (*optional*):
Ice Cream & Chocolate Sauce

👉 Everything that is optional is NOT included in da macros

✳️ Directions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F and lightly spray two 5- or 6-inch springform pans.
2. Mix the cookie batter wet and dry ingredients separately, then combine.
3. Mix the brownie batter wet and dry ingredients separately, then combine. Do not overmix.
4. Divide the brownie batter evenly between both pans.
5. Dollop the cookie batter over the brownie batter, gently spread, and add choc chips.
6. Bake 28–38 min (6-inch) or 32–42 min (5-inch), until the edges are set and the centers are slightly soft.
7. Cool in the pans for 30 minutes be

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The final direction is visibly truncated in the acquired description and is preserved literally rather than repaired.
Accepted after general decorative recipe-prefix cleanup and contextual exclusion of nutrition-correction and recommendation prose; no creator identity or exact recipe phrase is used.
